milestone_brief: Close deferred F-M2 from appearance-panel-layout-pass-2026q3-e2: rename the Appearance dock's "Render Mode" QGroupBox header to "Display & Quality". The original F-M2 finding called this Path (a) — V0-adequate, single-group-stays approach. The semantic issue: "Render Mode" misclassifies the Double-pass smooth toggle (which triggers a mesh regeneration, not just an actor display change like Wireframe / Show edges). Path (a) acknowledges both axes (display + quality) in the label without rearranging the buttons. Internal symbol names (_build_toggles_group, the "display-toggle" role property on all 3 buttons) STAY — they describe the technical pattern, not the user-facing semantic axis. Scope: appearance_panel.py:208 QGroupBox header rename + nearby comments; CONTEXT.md §4.3a + §8.16 doc references; tests/test_styles_palette.py + tests/test_enriques_hq_smoothing.py source-text assertions; the test_appearance_panel_render_mode_group_header test from the prior milestone must be updated (positive + negative regression guards on the new label). AI-15 honesty: "Display & Quality" is technically accurate — Wireframe / Show edges are display-pipeline toggles; Double-pass smooth is a quality toggle (it changes mesh fidelity). Peer cite: ParaView's "Display" tab follows the same single-group-multiple-axes pattern.
research_synthesis: Pure header rename, ~35 LOC across 5 files. appearance_panel.py:208 QGroupBox("Render Mode") → QGroupBox("Display && Quality") (double-ampersand is Qt literal-ampersand escape — single & would activate Alt+Q accelerator on the group box). Update 4 comments referencing Render Mode group in appearance_panel.py + 1 in styles.py + 2 in CONTEXT.md prose. Test rename in tests/test_styles_palette.py:842-869 (function rename + 3 assertion updates + 1 new negative guard against the Render Mode literal). One docstring update in tests/test_enriques_hq_smoothing.py:355. Internal symbols (_build_toggles_group, display-toggle role property) STAY per brief. AI-15 attestation: Display=actor.prop.* toggles; Quality=mesh regeneration toggle. All AI-1..AI-15 green.
